stemHtml: After requesting departure information on an airport where no ATIS is provided, the following information is transmitted:FASTAIR 345, DEPARTURE RUNWAY 32, WIND 290 DEGREES 4 KNOTS, QNH 1022, TEMPERATURE 10, DEWPOINT 5, RVR 550 METRES, TIME 27. What is the unit used to report the air temperature in this meteorological report?
